messages.content:
You will develop skills and knowledge working with conduits and raceways while _________.
furthering your career in the electrical trade
sticking with what you know
avoiding asking for help
not trying new things
continuing your education and seeking opportunities for growth

You will develop skills and knowledge working with conduits and raceways while _________.
furthering your career in the electrical trade
sticking with what you know
avoiding asking for help
not trying new things

taking on new and challenging projects
expanding your expertise in electrical installations and systems
improving your problem-solving abilities
being open to learning and adapting to new technologies and industry trends
gaining hands-on experience with different types of conduits and raceways
developing proficiency in estimating and planning conduit and raceway layouts
learning proper installation techniques and industry regulations for conduits and raceways
enhancing your ability to troubleshoot and resolve issues related to electrical conduits and raceways

What conduit is referred to as a raceway with a wall thickness between EMT and RMC?
AAC
IMC
MC
PVC
Intermediate Metal Conduit (IMC) is the conduit that is referred to as a raceway with a wall thickness between EMT (Electrical Metallic Tubing) and RMC (Rigid Metal Conduit).

The chapter for securing and supporting raceways is typically going to be found in _______ throughout the NEC.
.20
.10
.40
.30
The chapter for securing and supporting raceways is typically going to be found in Article 358 throughout the NEC (National Electrical Code).

The chapter for securing and supporting raceways is typically going to be found in _______ throughout the NEC.
.20
.10
.40
.30
The chapter for securing and supporting raceways is typically going to be found in Article 300 throughout the NEC (National Electrical Code).

A cast type compression connector uses _________ to grip onto the conduit system?
A lockring
Adhesive
Tape
A compression ring
A cast type compression connector uses a compression ring to grip onto the conduit system.

Fittings need to be _________ in order to be code compliant.
Coated
Listed
Painted
Purchased
Fittings need to be listed in order to be code compliant.

Conduit bodies must be ____________.
opened
painted
accessible
threaded
Conduit bodies must be accessible.

A T conduit body is which of the following?
A conduit body in the shape of a T
A straight through conduit body
A conduit body in the shape of a C
A T conduit body is a conduit body in the shape of a T.

Threads on RMC must be _______ in industrial installations to prevent combustible material from gaining access to the raceway.
Painted
Filed
Coated
Threads on RMC (Rigid Metal Conduit) must be coated in industrial installations to prevent combustible material from gaining access to the raceway.
